page: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-30-lssd is a memory-optimized server instance powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. It features 30 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 15 physical cores with multithreading enabled. The system is equipped with 240.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. Storage is bundled directly, consisting of two local NVMe SSDs providing 804 GB of high-speed local capacity.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core capabilities, with stress-ng single-core CPU performance and Geekbench text processing scoring in the top 25%. Memory performance is also notable, with the PassMark memory score ranking in the top tier, though large-block memory write bandwidth falls into the bottom 25%. Multi-core compute, database operations, and Redis SET operations consistently perform in the average range. For machine learning tasks, text generation using small LLM models shows strong throughput, while larger model inference remains average.

The qualitative cost efficiency of this instance is driven by its high memory density and integrated local NVMe storage, which reduces the need for external storage attachments for data-intensive tasks. The combination of 240 GB RAM and fast local SSDs makes this server highly suitable for memory-intensive databases, caching layers, software compilation, and medium-scale data processing pipelines.
description: The Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-30-lssd is a memory-optimized server configured with 30 dedicated vCPUs and 240.0 GB of RAM, powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor on the x86_64 architecture. This instance includes 804 GB of local NVMe SSD storage across two drives, offering high-speed local data access. Benchmark results show strong single-core CPU performance, high text processing speeds, and excellent memory performance, though large-block memory write bandwidth is a relative bottleneck. Multi-core operations, database tasks, and Redis throughput fall within the average tier. With 8.0 GB of RAM per vCPU and integrated high-speed storage, this instance provides a cost-efficient profile for memory-heavy workloads. It is well-suited for database hosting, caching layers, and memory-intensive data processing.

tagline: A memory-optimized instance featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors, high-density RAM, and integrated local NVMe SSD storage for data-intensive workloads.

240 GB of RAM providing 8.0 GB per core for memory-heavy tasks
804 GB of local NVMe SSD storage across two bundled drives

Optimized for database hosting, caching layers, and data processing
